visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A close-up view shows stacks of colorful float boards labeled 'Water Buddies' inside a large retail warehouse. The boards feature cartoon cupcake and melting face designs with large expressive eyes. A large Costco Wholesale logo is overlaid at the top of the frame. (2) A young woman wearing a bucket hat, glasses, a black long-sleeve shirt, and a white lace overall dress appears in the warehouse aisle. She holds two round, vibrant float boards—one yellow with blue icing and one a colorful cupcake—while smiling and looking at the camera. Yellow and white text bubbles appear around her. (3) The woman turns the boards to show their textured green and blue reverse sides. She gestures with the boards as she speaks, standing between tall warehouse shelves stocked with inflatable pool products. (4) The camera zooms in to a close-up of the cupcake float board held by the woman. She points at the large cartoon eyes and sprinkles printed on the surface. Her hands are visible gripping the edges of the lightweight foam board. (5) The woman holds the cupcake board in front of her face and rotates it slightly, demonstrating its size. A shopper and a cart are briefly visible in the blurred background behind her. Large blue and white variety text overlays move across the bottom of the screen. (6) She stands in the center of the frame, holding the cupcake board while gesturing with one finger. She continues to speak enthusiastically to the camera as the video concludes in the brightly lit retail environment.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 真的很可愛耶. (2) [Variety]: 這好好看哦. (3) [Variety]: 游泳想更有安全感嗎? 你需要這個299元的超輕浮板. (4) [Slogan]: 超可愛浮板. 299元. 超輕浮板. (5) [Variety]: 好可愛喲. 超可愛的. 它有兩個圖案. (6) [Variety]: 一個是這樣. 好像你. (7) [Variety]: 另外一個是這個. 嗯也像你. (8) [Variety]: 然後他的背面還有不同的顏色哦. 好可愛哦. (9) [Variety]: 那為什麼值得買. (10) [Variety]: 因為他只有240公克. 所以你攜帶的時候很方便. 很輕. (11) [Variety]: 而且他長得太可愛了. 不用怕別人拿走你的浮板. (12) [Variety]: 對. 他是杯子蛋糕哎. 好好看哦. (13) [Variety]: 你帶出去游泳池也不怕跟別人搞混. 嗯. (14) [Variety]: 然後他說他的穩定度高. 還有浮力也很好所以. 穩定度高. (15) [Variety]: 我覺得大人也沒問題. 我覺得可以買給小朋友. 圖案又很可愛. 杯子蛋糕. water body. (16) [Variety]: 夏天結束一定會特價. 大家可以等. 夏天結束為什麼要買它. 擺著可愛.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator, 1 female passer-by in distant background, 1 male shopper passing by with a cart.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young female wearing a black top under a white lace overall dress, a grey-blue bucket hat, and glasses.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: High-stacked industrial shelving units filled with retail boxes of summer pool toys and outdoor equipment in a typical warehouse-style store.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks with high energy and a bright tone, enunciating clearly as she introduces a product. An upbeat electronic BGM track with a steady 4/4 drum beat and a playful synth melody starts immediately, providing a cheerful backdrop. (2) A sharp, digital 'pop' sound effect punctuates the transition as the female narrator continues her pitch. The acoustic space has a slight natural resonance typical of an indoor hall, but the speech remains prominent and clear over the music. (3) A brief interaction occurs where a male voice enters with a humorous, low-pitched remark. The female voice responds with a light, melodic laugh while continuing her rhythmic narration. The BGM maintains its upbeat tempo throughout the exchange. (4) The narrator's speech rate increases slightly as she details product features like weight and price. Soft, friction-like sounds of foam surfaces rubbing together are audible as she moves the objects. The synth-pop music continues to drive the energy. (5) The audio concludes with a final energetic phrase from the female speaker, followed by a quick fade-out of the music. The overall mix is clean with minimal interference from environmental sounds.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Highlight -> Comparison -> CTA/Final Thought
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote 'Water Buddies' float boards found at Costco by highlighting their attractive design, lightweight portability, and affordable price for a lifestyle audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product showcasing with price points, brand logos, and specific feature highlights typical of an influencer recommendation.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high-arousal vocal delivery and vibrant visual overlays to appeal to a social-media-savvy consumer base looking for seasonal summer products.
